productDisplayName: Indian Terrain Men Navy Blue Check Shirt
description: Style Note Refresh your casual-ready portfolio with this indian terrain shirt. The precisely created premium shirt with trim lines, exclusive tailoring and soft fabric is designed to ensure you look your best even on the weekends Product Details Navy blue and red checked shirt that has a spread collar, full buttoned placket, long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, yoke at the back, embroidered branding on the left chest and a curved hem Material and Care 100% cotton Machine wash with like colours below 40 degrees using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Slim fit The model (height:6' and shoulders:18") is wearing a size M
